Regime Read
EUR/USD CROWDED LONG
Spread compression supports EUR strength. Leveraged Money 94th and Asset Manager 79th both crowded long — dual category confirmation, strongest reversal risk signal this framework produces.
USD/JPY NEUTRAL
Spread compression favors lower USD/JPY. Leveraged Money 69th and Asset Manager 69th both neutral — carry partially intact, BoJ path is key variable.
USD/INR RATE DIFF ONLY
US-IN spread at -3.35%. India yield premium intact at 3.35pp. Rate differential favors INR strength. FPI positioning data pending Playwright integration.
